steps.title: Model the cost structure
steps.content: Renting for $x$ days costs 270 dollars for the first day plus 135 dollars for each additional day. With $(x-1)$ additional days: $$y = 270 + 135(x-1)$$

steps.title: Expand to standard form
steps.content: Expanding the parentheses: $$y = 270 + 135x - 135 = 135x + 135$$ This is choice D — D is correct.
